item.title: CYJAX in 2025: A Year in Retrospect - CYJAX
item.description: 2025 was a defining year for CYJAX. With a bold rebrand, product innovation, and growing industry recognition, we strengthened our mission to empower organisations with analyst-enriched threat intelligence. This blog takes a retrospective look at CYJAX in 2025, a year that shaped our growth and direction.

item.title: CYJAX vs. SOC Radar: Different Approaches to Cyber Threat Intelligence - CYJAX
item.description: A detailed comparison of CYJAX and SOC Radar, exploring differences in automation, analyst-led investigations, RFIs, and intelligence depth to help security teams choose the right CTI platform.

item.title: Unveiling CYJAX 2.0: A Bold Rebrand and Fresh Approach to Threat Intelligence - CYJAX
item.description: Our new brand identity introduces a vibrant lime green palette - representing growth, agility, and illumination. It symbolises CYJAX’s commitment to shining a light on hidden risks and empowering organisations to anticipate and act decisively against emerging threats.
